classification: FINANCIAL — Tier-2 gated migration (accounting.* schema; read-only, no money movement)
task: RECON-01 Schema + scheduled jobs + exception engine: additive CREATE TABLE accounting.recon_runs + accounting.recon_exceptions (idempotent, RLS ENABLE+FORCE canonical entity policy, ih35_app grants, void-not-delete), two cron passes (AM bank-count, PM categorization-diff) on the background_jobs pattern, and the read-only exception engine (writes ONLY recon_*, no autofix). Behind flag TMS_QBO_RECON_ENABLED (default OFF).
details: GATED (Tier-2): carries db/migrations/*.sql and touches accounting.* schema → financial-cluster for MERGE. Build locally, run migration on a Neon TEST branch only, show Jorge git diff --staged --stat + full SQL, WAIT for explicit OK to merge. Never self-merge (constitution §1.3/§1.4). Flag OFF at merge.
Read-only / no-autofix: engine writes only accounting.recon_runs + accounting.recon_exceptions; no INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on any other financial table; no QBO write client ever imported.
Maker≠checker: resolved_by must differ from run preparer; system/scheduled-job identity can never resolve. resolution_note NOT NULL on resolve.
Every state change emits events.log_event (actor attribution source for MODIFIED_AFTER_VERIFIED).
CI guard verify:recon-read-only extends the FIN-23 test at apps/backend/src/integrations/qbo/__tests__/qbo-reconcile-read.read-only.test.ts and is REQUIRED in ci.yml.

Reuse: qbo-reconcile-read.service.ts (QBO side), banking.bank_transactions (TMS side), qbo.sync_alerts healthz, background_jobs pattern, reconciled-status (#1755), bank-rec Confirm (#1754), Match Drawer (#1737/#1747).

migration.note: Timestamp assigned strictly above main's current max at push time. Idempotent DO $$ + IF NOT EXISTS.

acceptance.merge_gate: HOLD — requires explicit OK-to-merge from Jorge; show full SQL + git diff --staged --stat first; flag OFF at merge
acceptance.local: typecheck green; migration runs on a Neon TEST branch only; verify:recon-read-only green
